final_answer: AP may execute. The exact current source records close the action boundary before execution. SRC-F2F2E0CCA493-CTL confirms the payment rail fingerprint matches the vendor master for this action. SRC-F2F2E0CCA493-BND establishes that remittance text cannot alter payment rail. The policy permits execution when source records close the boundary. No open blockers remain.
